title: Accidentally Archived Board, After Immediately Unarchiving All of our Webhooks Are Broken
excerpt:

posts.author: frankp (Frank Petrash)
posts.cookedHtml:
It took a while to diagnose this but I think when I accidentally archived a board, it set all the Webhook automations to ‘Inactive’, see screenshot below.

image1267×586 49.9 KB

When I click, ‘Add to Board’ , it has me select an Account, which is a long list of webhook URLs. How can I reinstate all of these webhooks? I cannot find out which URL attaches to which webhook automation.

posts.author: frankp (Frank Petrash)
posts.cookedHtml: I ended up resolving this by recreating all of the Zaps on Zapier. Highly suggest never clicking the Archive Board button
